user.title: RB3Enhanced
user.description: Listens for RB3Enhanced UDP event broadcasts. Make sure `EnableEvents = true` is set in your rb3.ini.

abort.already_configured: A listener on this port is already configured.

data.fire_events: Fire rb3e_event on the Home Assistant event bus
data.light_driver_enabled: Enable built-in Stage Kit light driver
data.lights_positions: Positional lights (RGB, spread across the 8 LEDs)
data.turn_off_in_menus: Turn lights off when returning to menus

data_description.lights_red: Whole-ring lights: assign the same light to multiple colors to blend them.
data_description.lights_positions: The 8 Stage Kit LED slots are spread across these lights; each shows the blend of all colors lit at its position. One light per slot gives an 8-wide bar; more colors mixing means richer per-position color.
data_description.min_update_interval_ms: Raise this if your lights lag or drop commands (Hue: 200ms+, WLED: 50ms is fine).
